product_description: Handmade cold-pressed face oils and natural lip balms. Sourced from small farms in Kerala, delivered pan-India. 3-product range, starting at ₹450.
target_audience: Women aged 25-40 in metros (Mumbai, Bangalore, Delhi NCR, Pune) who read ingredient labels, prefer natural/Ayurvedic products, and are willing to pay 2-3x mass-market prices for quality.
unique_selling_points: Every bottle is traceable to the farm and harvest date
Direct from Kerala — no middleman markup
